response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video: 00:00-00:09 is an intro screen animation. 2. 00:10-00:13 is a reaction to a jingle/announcement music. 3. 00:14-05:01 is conversational, discussing collaboration and album announcements. No full vocal songs were identified to perform a lyrics search. 4. All segments contain only incidental background music or jingles, thus 'contains_vocal_music' is false for all scenes.
response.global_summary: An announcement video featuring members of the VTuber group 'Secret Society holoX' (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha). They discuss an upcoming collaboration with the Monogatari series and announce their first album, 'Secret Order'.

scenes.description: Text-based intro animation for the holoX and Monogatari series collaboration.
Short music jingle plays announcing the collaboration; VTubers react with surprise.
HoloX members discuss the collaboration and announce their upcoming album 'Secret Order'.
